bricks.blueprint_yaml:
name: find_max_value
description: DSL-generated pipeline with 3 steps
inputs:
  values: Any
steps:
- name: step_1_for_each
  brick: __for_each__
  params:
    items: ${inputs.values}
    do_brick: set_dict_field
    item_kwarg: value
    static_kwargs:
      data: {}
      field: v
    on_error: fail
  save_as: step_1_for_each
- name: step_2_map_values
  brick: map_values
  params:
    items: ${step_1_for_each.result}
    key: result
  save_as: step_2_map_values
- name: step_3_calculate_aggregates
  brick: calculate_aggregates
  params:
    items: ${step_2_map_values.result}
    field: v
    operation: max
  save_as: step_3_calculate_aggregates
outputs_map:
  max: ${step_3_calculate_aggregates.result}
